caption:
Chipotle BOGO Entrees is back Friday March 13th

Between 3-4pm on March 13th, pick any entree you want and get the second one for free

Must show a tattoo either real or fake(can be one that you draw on yourself)

#food #chipotle #deals

transcription.text: Chipotle's buy one get one free entrees is back Friday, March 13th. Buy any entree you want between 3 to 4 p.m. and you'll get the second one for free.
